productDisplayName: Peter England Men Solid Maroon Shirt
description: Composition Maroon shirt made of rich cotton fabric with 16 SPI, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Crafted from rich cotton fabric and stitched to perfection, this formal shirt from peter england's English Cottons collection offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
